name: vibe-thesis
description: Vibe Thesis — scaffold and co-author thesis-shaped artifacts (PDF, HTML, lay-version) with Claude Code. Install, say 'scaffold a vibe thesis project,' get a styled PDF skeleton plus a working render pipeline in roughly 30 minutes. Voice pipeline (voice → smooth → guard) layers on top.
author: 626Labs LLC

port.notes: Manifest mirrors the Claude Code plugin.json version (0.2.0). vibe-thesis has no session/friction loggers, so nothing reads this version field at runtime — pure port-bookkeeping, kept for family consistency. Antigravity discovers workflows from .agent/workflows/; this plugin has no .agent/skills/ (no internal skills). Bundled scaffold assets ship under .agent/templates/ and .agent/examples/.
